# Rhizome Visuals — Joshua Binswanger

> Joshua Binswanger is a designer and scientific illustrator working as Rhizome
> Visuals. He works at the intersection of knowledge transfer and visual
> storytelling, communicating complex scientific information through 3D
> visualisation, illustration and information design.

## About

- Name: Joshua Binswanger
- Practice: Rhizome Visuals (rhizome.ch)
- Discipline: Scientific illustration, 3D design & visualisation, information design
- Tools: SideFX Houdini, Blender
- Contact: info@rhizome.ch
- Location: Switzerland

## Services

- Scientific Illustration
- 3D Design & Visualisation
- Drawing & Illustration
- Infographics
- Workshops

## Selected Clients

ETH, Hereon @DESY, University of Zurich, SLF, HNE Eberswalde, LWF Bayern

## Pages

- [Home](https://rhizome.ch/): Featured project gallery
- [Projects](https://rhizome.ch/project-index): Index of client and research projects
- [About](https://rhizome.ch/info): Background, services and clients
- [Personal work](https://rhizome.ch/personal): Personal and experimental projects
